# [.github](https://github.com/casuya-co-tz/.github)

#### Official organization profile, governance, standards, and community health files for the Casuya ecosystem.

[About](#-about) • [Structure](#-structure) • [Files](#-files) • [Contributing](#-contributing) • [License](#-license)

---

## 📋 About

This repository contains organization-level governance and community health files that apply across the entire Casuya ecosystem. It is **not** an application repository.

### What's Inside

| Badge                                                                                                       | Category                 | Description        |
| ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------ | ------------------ |
| ![# Profile](https://img.shields.io/badge/⬡_Profile-00D4FF?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=white) | **Organization Profile** | Public description |
| ![# Templates](https://img.shields.io/badge/📑_Templates-9B59B6?style=for-the-badge)                        | **Issue & PR Templates** | Standardized forms |
| ![# Governance](https://img.shields.io/badge/🏛_Governance-2ECC71?style=for-the-badge)                       | **Governance**           | Project structure  |
| ![# Standards](https://img.shields.io/badge/⚙_Standards-F39C12?style=for-the-badge)                         | **Standards**            | Development rules  |

---

## 📂 Structure

```
.github/
│
├── 📄 README.md                          # This file
├── 📄 LICENSE                            # Apache License 2.0
├── 📄 CONTRIBUTING.md                    # Contribution guidelines
├── 📄 CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md                 # Community standards
├── 📄 SECURITY.md                        # Security policy
├── 📄 SUPPORT.md                         # Support channels
├── 📄 GOVERNANCE.md                      # Project governance
├── 📄 REPOSITORY_STANDARDS.md            # Development standards
├── 📄 ARCHITECTURE_PRINCIPLES.md         # Architecture decisions
├── 📄 DEPENDENCY_POLICY.md               # Dependency management
├── 📄 VERSIONING_POLICY.md               # Version management
├── 📄 RELEASE_POLICY.md                  # Release process
│
├── 📁 profile/
│   └── 📄 README.md                      # Organization profile
│
├── 📁 ISSUE_TEMPLATE/
│   ├── 📄 bug_report.md                  # Bug report template
│   ├── 📄 feature_request.md             # Feature request template
│   ├── 📄 lesson-package-issue.md        # Lesson package issues
│   ├── 📄 security-report.md             # Security reports
│   └── 📄 documentation-improvement.md   # Documentation issues
│
└── 📁 PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE/
    └── 📄 pull_request_template.md       # PR template
```

---

## 📁 Files

### Core Documents

| File                   | Purpose                          | Link                       |
| ---------------------- | -------------------------------- | -------------------------- |
| **CONTRIBUTING.md**    | Guidelines for contributors      | [View](CONTRIBUTING.md)    |
| **CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md** | Community behavior standards     | [View](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md) |
| **SECURITY.md**        | Security vulnerability reporting | [View](SECURITY.md)        |
| **SUPPORT.md**         | Support and help channels        | [View](SUPPORT.md)         |

### Governance & Standards

| File                           | Purpose                             | Link                               |
| ------------------------------ | ----------------------------------- | ---------------------------------- |
| **GOVERNANCE.md**              | Project governance structure        | [View](GOVERNANCE.md)              |
| **REPOSITORY_STANDARDS.md**    | Development standards for all repos | [View](REPOSITORY_STANDARDS.md)    |
| **ARCHITECTURE_PRINCIPLES.md** | Architecture decision records       | [View](ARCHITECTURE_PRINCIPLES.md) |
| **DEPENDENCY_POLICY.md**       | Dependency management rules         | [View](DEPENDENCY_POLICY.md)       |
| **VERSIONING_POLICY.md**       | Semantic versioning rules           | [View](VERSIONING_POLICY.md)       |
| **RELEASE_POLICY.md**          | Release process and cadence         | [View](RELEASE_POLICY.md)          |

### Templates

| Template                      | Purpose                         | Link                                                   |
| ----------------------------- | ------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------ |
| **Bug Report**                | Report software bugs            | [View](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.md)                   |
| **Feature Request**           | Suggest new features            | [View](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/feature_request.md)              |
| **Lesson Package Issue**      | Report lesson package problems  | [View](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/lesson-package-issue.md)         |
| **Security Report**           | Report security vulnerabilities | [View](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/security-report.md)              |
| **Documentation Improvement** | Suggest doc improvements        | [View](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/documentation-improvement.md)    |
| **Pull Request**              | Submit code changes             | [View](PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE/pull_request_template.md) |

## 🤝 Contributing

To contribute to this repository or any Casuya project:

1. Read the [Contributing Guidelines](CONTRIBUTING.md)
2. Review the [Code of Conduct](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
3. Check the [Repository Standards](REPOSITORY_STANDARDS.md)
4. Submit your changes via Pull Request
